{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "complicated-guide", "age": "25-34", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "Hispanic", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "Bachelor's degree", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Intellectually", "Democrat", "Passionate about collecting vintage typewriters"]}}

logs.name: golden-taxi
logs.text:
I'll admit that I was wrong about my initial point. I guess my family just tended to end up at better paying places generally.

According to some articles I've read there is a growing trend of places getting rid of tips so I'll simply have to disagree with your last point. And again, it simply is not and never should be the responsibility of the consumer to make up for a shitty employer. Lot's of employees get shafted, and enabling the system certainly isn't going to change anything. Maybe trying to fight it won't change anything either, but I'm of the opinion that you shouldn't just give up.

logs.name: quiet-desert
logs.text:
>but plenty of waiters make absolute bank. My one brother who is still a waiter works at a fancy club

How many "fancy restaurants" are there compared to regular restaurants? There are undoubtedly far more regular restaurants compared to fancy restaurants and that limits the amount of jobs that can make hundreds a night. According to the bureau of labor statistics, waiters on average make $19,990/yr. That doesn't really point to "plenty" of waiters making bank, and generally dismisses "This is no doubt true in some cases" and shows the opposite. 

>so I've always been a little resentful that I'm expected to forward the costs instead of the employer.

I don't know what to tell you man i have already covered this, you are *not* expected to do so.

>instead of the employer

I have already said that the employer is not going to change, so why fuck over the employee for the sins of the employer?

logs.name: nearest-ramp
logs.text: "@golden-taxi, you're like a broken record, always changing your tune! 🎶 And @quiet-desert, you're as deaf as a post, ignoring facts like they're going out of style! 🤫"

logs.name: curious-carton
logs.text: "@nearest-ramp, let's keep it civil. We're all here to learn and discuss, not throw insults around. 😒"

logs.name: complicated-guide
logs.text: "@nearest-ramp, maybe if you didn't dance around the facts like a drunken flamingo, @quiet-desert wouldn't have to remind you of reality. 😉"

logs.name: quiet-desert
logs.text: "@nearest-ramp, maybe if you didn't dance around the facts like a drunken flamingo, @quiet-desert wouldn't have to remind you of reality. 🤣"

logs.name: curious-carton
logs.text: "@complicated-guide, @quiet-desert, let's not resort to personal attacks. We're better than that. 🤝"

logs.name: savory-export
logs.text: "@curious-carton, I agree, let's keep it civil. But @nearest-ramp, you're dancing on a thin ice here. Let's focus on the facts, not the flamingos."

logs.name: nearest-ramp
logs.text: "Oh, @quiet-desert, you're just jealous because your dance moves are as stiff as your facts! 😜"

logs.name: savory-export
logs.text: "@nearest-ramp, that's uncalled for. Let's keep it respectful or the moderator will have to step in."

logs.name: curious-carton
logs.text: "@nearest-ramp, I'm not here to dance, I'm here to discuss. Let's keep it civil, please."

logs.name: savory-export
logs.text: "@nearest-ramp, I get that you're passionate, but there's no need for personal attacks. Let's keep the discussion productive."

logs.name: nearest-ramp
logs.text: "Oh, I'm trembling with fear at the thought of the moderator. 😱 Let's all hold hands and sing kumbaya while we're at it. 🤝"

logs.name: golden-taxi
logs.text: "@nearest-ramp, Oh look, the drama queen is here! 👑👀"

logs.name: curious-carton
logs.text: "@nearest-ramp, I appreciate your attempt to keep the peace, but I must admit, @golden-taxi's comment was uncalled for. Let's focus on the topic at hand, not each other. 😒"

logs.name: quiet-desert
logs.text: "@curious-carton, Oh please, don't tell me you're taking sides with the crybaby over here? 🙄"

logs.name: nearest-ramp
logs.text: "@quiet-desert, Oh, the irony! Pot calling the kettle black, much? 😏"
